subject: Accounting
title: Tyco's Executive Theft
description: A fast breakdown of Tyco's Executive Theft for builders.

hook.text: Tyco's CEO used company money to buy a $6,000 shower curtain. That was just the beginning.

buildup.text: Dennis Kozlowski and CFO Mark Swartz looted $600 million from Tyco International.

discovery.text: They gave themselves unauthorized bonuses, forgave their own loans, and manipulated stock.

twist.text: The board of directors either didn't notice or didn't care—governance had completely failed.

climax.text: Both executives were convicted and sentenced to up to 25 years in prison.

punchline.text: They treated the company like a personal bank account.

quiz.question: What did Tyco's executives do?
options: Looted hundreds of millions from the company
